transcript.text: Hare Krishna! I am calling from Hare Krishna Movement Hyderabad about the Janmashtami Maha Abhishekam seva. Is this a good time to talk?
Hare Krishna. Yes, please tell me.
This Janmashtami we are offering Abhishekam seva sponsorship. Many devotees are participating. Would you like to offer seva this year?
Last year I gave for Annadaan. What is the amount for Abhishekam?
Seva starts from ₹2,100 and there is a special Abhishekam sponsorship at ₹11,000 with prasadam and a certificate.
Okay, I would like to do the ₹11,000 Abhishekam seva. Please send me the payment link on WhatsApp.
Wonderful! Hare Krishna. I will send the secure link right away and our team will share your receipt.
Hare Krishna! Calling from HKM Hyderabad regarding Vrindavan Kartik Yatra. Is this a good time?
I am in a meeting right now, can you call me in the evening?
Of course. What time works best?
After 7 PM please.
Noted, I will arrange a callback after 7 PM. Hare Krishna!
Hare Krishna! Calling from HKM Hyderabad regarding Vrindavan Kartik Yatra. Is this a good time?
I am in a meeting right now, can you call me in the evening?
Of course. What time works best?
After 7 PM please.
Noted, I will arrange a callback after 7 PM. Hare Krishna!
Hare Krishna! Calling from HKM Hyderabad regarding Vrindavan Kartik Yatra. Is this a good time?
I am in a meeting right now, can you call me in the evening?
Of course. What time works best?
After 7 PM please.
Noted, I will arrange a callback after 7 PM. Hare Krishna!
Hare Krishna! Calling from HKM Hyderabad about the Janmashtami seva.
Not interested, please remove my number.
I understand. I will update our records and you will not be contacted again. Hare Krishna.
Hare Krishna! Calling from HKM Hyderabad regarding your recent donation enquiry.
Yes — actually I made a payment of ₹50,000 last week but I have not received my 80G receipt yet. This is the second time I am following up.
I am very sorry for the delay. This is important — let me escalate this to our donor relations team immediately so they can resolve your receipt today.
Please do. I am a regular donor and this is disappointing.
I completely understand. Our senior team will call you back within the hour with a resolution. Hare Krishna.
Hare Krishna! Calling from HKM Hyderabad about the Janmashtami seva.
Not interested, please remove my number.
I understand. I will update our records and you will not be contacted again. Hare Krishna.
